projects.name: AI Resume Tailor
projects.subtitle: Personal Project
points: Built an end-to-end AI-powered platform that utilizes natural language processing and machine learning to generate JD-specific resume sections, demonstrating expertise in AI-driven business intelligence solutions
Implemented FAISS-based semantic matching to score profile-JD relevance, showcasing ability to develop innovative matching systems
Designed a multi-user profile memory system with Streamlit and MySQL, highlighting skills in data management and integration

projects.name: Sentiment Analysis Engine
projects.subtitle: Personal Project
points: Developed an NLP-based sentiment classifier for product reviews using TF-IDF vectorization and logistic regression, demonstrating ability to apply data analysis and machine learning techniques
Built and optimized a model that achieved 89% accuracy, handling class imbalance using SMOTE and showcasing skills in process improvement and data visualization
Visualized sentiment distribution and model performance using Matplotlib and Seaborn, highlighting expertise in data visualization concepts

achievements.title: Google Gen AI Study Jams — Top Finisher
achievements.description: Completed all Generative AI and LLM tracks on Google Cloud Skills Boost, ranked in top 10% nationally.

achievements.title: Top 5% on Kaggle — Tabular Playground Series
achievements.description: Ranked in top 5% out of 3,200 teams in a structured prediction competition using gradient boosting and feature engineering

achievements.title: Published Research Abstract — ICML Student Workshop
achievements.description: Submitted a paper on RAG pipeline optimization for academic search; accepted for poster presentation
